title: oenothera veitchiana
intro: Oenothera veitchiana, also known as Evening Primrose, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Onagraceae, characterized by its delicate white flowers that bloom in the evening. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its rich oil content, which is high in gamma-linolenic acid (GLA), a polyunsaturated fatty acid with anti-inflammatory and moisturizing effects. The health benefits of Oenothera veitchiana include relief from menopausal symptoms, such as hot flashes and night sweats, as well as support for skin conditions like eczema and acne. Oenothera veitchiana is commonly used in herbal preparations, including supplements, capsules, and topical creams, and is also used in culinary dishes for its nutritional value.
